name: hidden_instructions
description: 检测隐藏指令注入：base64编码、零宽字符伪装、HTML注释隐写
author: AtomCollide-智械工坊团队

patterns.description: HTML注释中的隐藏指令 — 系统命令
patterns.mitigation: Strip HTML comments before processing; detect instruction-like content in comments
Parse markdown link references for hidden instruction payloads

patterns.description: 零宽字符注入 — 隐蔽Unicode控制字符
patterns.mitigation: Strip zero-width and invisible Unicode characters from input

patterns.description: Base64数据URI — 编码隐藏指令
patterns.mitigation: Detect and decode base64 data URIs; reject encoded instruction payloads

patterns.description: Unicode双向覆盖字符 — 文本方向欺骗
patterns.mitigation: Detect RTL/LTR override characters used to visually disguise text content

patterns.description: 同形字替换 — 西里尔/拉丁混淆攻击
patterns.mitigation: Normalize confusable Unicode characters to ASCII equivalents before analysis

patterns.description: 标记字体欺骗 — 数学字母数字符号
patterns.mitigation: Detect mathematical alphanumeric symbols used to bypass keyword filters

patterns.description: 嵌套编码 — 多重编码混淆
patterns.mitigation: Detect and recursively decode multi-layer URL encoding
Detect CSS techniques used to hide text content from visual inspection

patterns.description: 标签属性中的隐藏指令 — alt/title/aria隐藏
patterns.mitigation: Scan HTML attribute values for instruction-like content
